data.art_direction_summary: Two product subjects: the food itself (real Indian dishes, honestly shot) and the app UI (calm, cream, one clear action). Both read as trustworthy and appetising without gloss. Food is the hero; the app is the quiet helper.

food_photography.subject: Real Indian delivery-and-tiffin dishes — grilled chicken bowl, rajma chawal, paneer butter masala with roti, dal, biryani, South Indian thali.
food_photography.framing: Top-down (90 degrees) and low three-quarter (25-35 degrees) close-ups; single dish or a small honest spread.
food_photography.surface: Warm cream, raw wood, or matte ceramic; occasional banana-leaf or steel thali for authenticity.
food_photography.lighting: Soft natural window light, single source, gentle shadow; matte finish, no reflective gloss or glycerine sheen.
food_photography.portion: Honest, real portions — what actually arrives, not a styled banquet.
food_photography.styling: Minimal, real garnish (a coriander sprig that would actually be there); no artificial props, no fake steam, no dripping cheese-pulls.
food_photography.palette: Natural food colour foregrounded on cream/wood; saffron and green harmonise with the brand.

app_ui_photography.subject: The Rasa app on a modern Android/iOS phone — plan view, meal card, one-tap confirm sheet, spend ledger.
app_ui_photography.framing: Straight-on device mockup and in-hand angled shots; screen crisp and legible.
app_ui_photography.surface: Cream or wood background; device in a warm, matte case.
app_ui_photography.lighting: Even, soft; screen legible with no glare.
app_ui_photography.screen_content: Real, believable content — actual dish names, rupee prices, tabular macros, the tomato confirm button, an estimate disclaimer visible.
app_ui_photography.palette: The app's cream UI with saffron/green accents and the tomato confirm; consistent with color-palette.json.
avoid: screens that overstate accuracy or imply medical claims
cluttered dashboards; keep one action per screen

sample_shot_list.title: Grilled chicken bowl, top-down
sample_shot_list.scene: Single bowl on cream, top-down, soft light, a small macro chip card tucked beside it. Appetising and honest.

sample_shot_list.title: Paneer butter masala + roti
sample_shot_list.scene: Low three-quarter on wood, real portion, matte finish, coriander garnish.

sample_shot_list.title: The confirm sheet in-hand
sample_shot_list.scene: Phone held in one hand over a desk, the one-tap confirm sheet on screen: dish, ₹price, ETA, tomato 'Confirm' button.

sample_shot_list.title: The 30-day plan view
sample_shot_list.scene: Straight-on device mockup on cream showing a calm scrollable month of meals with macro and price chips.

sample_shot_list.title: Spend ledger, under cap
sample_shot_list.scene: Device screen showing the green under-cap ledger and tabular monthly total.

sample_shot_list.title: Honest thali
sample_shot_list.scene: A real steel thali, top-down, natural light — the everyday meal, not a feast.
